title: Senior Life Membership
description: For a lifetime of access to USNI.org and all benefits therein, for our supporters 60 and over. Plus special life member gifts to remind you of your commitment to the Sea Services.
text:
Senior Life Members receive:
A 34% discount on their life membership.
The print edition of Proceedings magazine, the most important and must-read publication for the Sea Services, plus full access to USNI.org and the digital edition of the Proceedings.
NEW: Access to Proceedings in its original format online as an interactive flippable PDF, now available from the November 2024 issue onward.
NEW: 20% off all purchases in our Naval Institute Ship's Store year-round.
Discounts of up to 40% off of all titles published by the Naval Institute Press.
A 28% discount on subscriptions to our award-winning bi-monthly Naval History magazine.
Subscription to USNI News: Sea Scroll, our weekly members-only newsletter.
Exclusive invitations to our free professional conference series and events, as well as a significant discount on registration for the largest Sea Services conference in the nation, WEST, held every winter in San Diego, CA. Network with members, military leaders, and defense industry executives.
Access to over 150 years of archival information, including oral histories, rare photographs, and every article published in Proceedings from 1874 to today.
The opportunity to lend your voice to the open forum and engage in intellectual debate to advance the naval profession.
A Naval Institute Fleece Pullover.
An official Life Member Baseball Cap.
An embroidered Naval Institute patch.
A Naval Institute lapel pin.
Naval Institute decals and a special Life Member certificate.
